items.title: Paolo Banchero trade value in the aftermath of the Jaylen Brown trade?
items.author: JoeBiden2020FTW
items.body_excerpt: Paolo Banchero is a great young prospect, he was a top 3 pick and averages a lot of points, and made an All Star team. However, kinda like Jaylen Brown, he has the horrible coincidence that his team always plays worse when he's on the court. We just saw how the league now seems…

items.title: Yaxel Lendeborg says the players he watches most are Paolo Banchero, Naz Neid, LeBron James and Magic Johnson
items.author: Dalton Johnson
items.body_excerpt:
Yaxel Lendeborg says the players he watches most are Paolo Banchero, Naz Neid, LeBron James and Magic Johnson 

I asked about if he like his Dominican LeBron nickname: "I do. I really do. It was really fun trying to keep that legacy."
